description: Test manifest for 'game'. Tracks all tests, their status, and what they cover.
rules: Never remove or weaken existing tests — only add or fix them.
Update status after running: not_started -> failing -> passing.
Add new entries when writing new test files or test cases.

tests.covers: App component renders, unauthenticated redirect to /login
tests: renders without crashing
redirects unauthenticated users to login

tests.covers: LoginPage form rendering, register link, auth redirect
tests: renders login form with username and password fields
shows link to register page
redirects authenticated users away from login

tests.covers: RegisterPage form rendering, login link, auth redirect, client-side validation (password length, password match, username length)
tests: renders registration form with all required fields
shows link to login page
redirects authenticated users away from register
validates password length on submit
validates password match on submit
validates username length on submit

tests.covers: LobbyPage rendering, lobby channel integration, room table display, create game modal flow, join game flow, sign out, online player count
tests: renders header with username and sign out button
connects lobby channel for real-time updates
shows empty state when no waiting rooms exist
shows room table when waiting rooms exist
shows Create Game button that opens modal
creates game and navigates to game page on submit
joins a room and navigates to game page
shows online player count when available
navigates to login on sign out

tests.covers: GamePage orchestrator: loading state, error handling, room fetch + game store init, channel connection, waiting room rendering, leave room flow, channel error display, cleanup on unmount, play again room creation with same seat config, play again error handling
tests: shows loading spinner while fetching room data
shows error and back button when room fetch fails
initializes game store and connects channel after fetching room
renders waiting room when no game state exists
navigates back to lobby when Leave Room is clicked
shows channel error with back button when channel fails
resets game store on unmount
creates a new room with same seat config when Play Again is clicked
shows toast when Play Again room creation fails

tests.covers: BiddingPanel: bid buttons rendering, bid/pass dispatch, waiting message for non-active player, current bid display with bidder name, bid history
tests: shows bid buttons and pass when it is your turn
calls onBid with correct amount when bid button is clicked
calls onPass when pass button is clicked
shows waiting message when it is not your turn
shows current bid and bidder name when bids exist

tests.covers: TrumpSelector: suit button rendering, suit selection dispatch, waiting message for non-active player
tests: shows 4 suit buttons when it is your turn
calls onDeclareTrump with selected suit
shows waiting message when it is not your turn

tests.covers: TrickArea: trick number display, empty slot rendering with position initials, played card rendering with leader indicator, trick count incrementing, your-turn indicator
tests: shows trick number and empty slots when no cards played
shows played cards in their relative positions
increments trick number based on completed tricks
shows Your turn indicator when it is your turn

tests.covers: HandSelector: selection instruction and counter, card rendering as buttons, confirm button disabled state, selection counter updates, card selection + confirm dispatch, waiting message for non-active player
tests: shows selection instruction and counter
renders all cards as clickable buttons
disables confirm button until 6 cards are selected
updates selection counter when cards are clicked
calls onSelectHand with selected cards when confirm is clicked
shows waiting message when it is not your turn

tests.covers: GameOverOverlay: winner/loser announcement, score display, navigation buttons (Back to Lobby, Play Again), button click dispatch
tests: shows winner announcement when North/South wins and you are on that team
shows loss message when your team loses
shows navigation buttons
calls onBackToLobby when Back to Lobby is clicked
calls onPlayAgain when Play Again is clicked

tests.covers: WaitingRoom: room code display, waiting status, player name + You badge, disconnect indicators (DC badge + opacity dim), leave button, game starting message when full
tests: shows room code and waiting status
shows player name and You badge for occupied seats
shows DC badge and dims disconnected players
calls onLeave when Leave Room button is clicked
shows Game starting message when all 4 seats are filled

tests.covers: useToast hook: add/dismiss messages; ToastContainer: rendering, role=alert, auto-dismiss after timeout
tests: adds a toast message and returns it in messages array
dismisses a toast by id
renders nothing when messages array is empty
renders toast messages with correct text and role
auto-dismisses toast after duration

tests.covers: ConnectionBanner: hidden when connected, shows Reconnecting when disconnected, shows Reconnected after recovery, auto-hides Reconnected after 2 seconds
tests: renders nothing when connected and never disconnected
shows Reconnecting banner when disconnected
shows Reconnected banner after disconnection followed by reconnection
auto-hides Reconnected banner after 2 seconds

tests.covers: RoomTable: skeleton loading rows, empty state after load, room display after load
tests: shows skeleton rows when loading
shows empty state after loading completes with no rooms
shows rooms after loading completes

tests.covers: Card component: getPidroPoints scoring logic (trump five, off-five, ace, two, jack, ten, non-scoring cards, non-trump cards), face-down rendering, face-up rendering with rank/suit, playable button vs static div, onClick dispatch, point value badge display
tests: returns null when no trump suit is provided
returns 5 for the five of trump (pidro)
returns 5 for the off-five (same color, different suit)
returns null for the five of a different color
returns 1 for ace of trump (rank 1 or 14)
returns 1 for the two of trump (low)
returns 1 for the jack of trump
returns 10 for the ten of trump (game)
returns null for non-scoring trump cards (e.g. 3, 4, 6-9, Q, K)
returns null for non-trump cards that are not the off-five
renders face-down card when faceDown is true
renders face-down card when no card data is provided
renders face-up card with rank and suit
renders as a button when playable
calls onClick when playable card is clicked
renders as a div (not button) when not playable
shows point value badge when pointValue is provided
does not show point badge when pointValue is 0 or null

tests.covers: PlayerHand: username display, dealer badge, DC badge with opacity dim, face-down cards for opponents, face-up cards for current player, playable card buttons vs static cards, onPlayCard dispatch, empty hand 'No cards' message, turn indicator (pulsing dot)
tests: shows username and You badge for the current player
shows dealer badge when player is dealer
shows DC badge and dims when player is disconnected
renders face-down cards for opponents
renders face-up cards for the current player
marks playable cards as buttons and non-playable as divs
calls onPlayCard when a playable card is clicked
shows 'No cards' when count is 0
shows turn indicator when it is the player turn
